title: carex vulpina f. capitulata
intro: Carex vulpina f. capitulata, also known as the fox sedge or bushy sedge, is a subspecies of the Carex vulpina plant, a type of flowering plant in the sedge family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Carex vulpina f. capitulata include relief from digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often used to make teas, salves, or ointments for topical application.
